reflection:
interesting one yesterday. you slept through to 5:27 instead of bouncing awake at 4, and you noticed it yourself. whoop tells the same story, recovery 84, hrv 40, sleep efficiency 96. five-day high on every line. you scored your sleep quality 4 out of 5 but refreshed only 2 out of 5, which is the bit i want to sit with you on. the body is recovering. the feeling of being refreshed isn't catching up yet.

so when you wrote in the worry dump that your state has 'detorriated super wird,' i want to push back. the data doesn't say that. it says your afternoon went sideways once you parked at the desk for hours and then mitja pressed on structures that woke up the lower back and sciatica. mechanical, not collapse. you knew this in the evening notes. trust that part of you, not the panic part.

the thing i'd flag is calories. 1572, 1534, 1429, then nothing logged yesterday. mood drifted from 7 to 5 across the same window. probably not coincidence. you also skipped the screens cutoff again.

the speech is still sitting there, untouched. you wrote about avoiding it twice now. one concrete thing today, open the doc and put 25 minutes on a timer. that's it.

you did 16 things yesterday. you're not broken.
opener: physiology is actually recovering, the panic doesn't match the data
focus_for_today: open the speech doc, 25 minutes on a timer, that's the whole ask
